mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate below 3.5% signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and housing starts signals expanding real economic activity that improves corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and HOUST fails to produce positive 20d SPX returns in 50%+ of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth combined with low inflation creates a 'Goldilocks' macro environment that supports equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: high GDP growth with low inflation
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns when GDPC1 growth exceeds 3% and CPIAUCSL remains below 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 150k jobs signals robust labor market demand that drives consumer spending and equity earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate above 4.5% signals monetary tightening that increases equity discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in consumer credit availability (RSAFS) below 500 billion signals reduced household spending power that depresses equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where RSAFS declines.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production below 105 signals weakening manufacturing activity that reduces corporate earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO falls below 105.
